name: set_power_opt
full_help:
set_power_opt

Description: 
Set constraints for power optimization

Syntax: 
set_power_opt  [-include_cells <args>] [-exclude_cells <args>] [-clocks <args>]
               [-cell_types <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-include_cells]  Include only these instances for clock gating.
                    Default: all
  [-exclude_cells]  Exclude these instances from clock gating.
                    Default: none
  [-clocks]         Clock gate instances clocked by these clocks only.
                    Default: all clocks
  [-cell_types]     Clock gate these cell types only. Specify either 
                    [all|none], or one or more of [bram|reg|srl].
                    Default: all
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Power, XDC

arguments.description: Include only these instances for clock gating. Default: all
Exclude these instances from clock gating. Default: none
Clock gate instances clocked by these clocks only. Default: all clocks

Suspend message limits during command execution
